subcodes.title: The Eighth Principle—Universal Peace: Words spoken on 1911-11-29 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: A Supreme Tribunal shall be established by the peoples and Governments of every nation, composed of members elected from each country and Government.
subcodes.first_line_orig: از جمله أوامر حضرت بهاء الله اینست که باید جمیع ملت
subcodes.subjects: @universal language, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity
